query:
INSERT INTO site_settings (setting_key, setting_value, setting_type, description, updated_at) VALUES 
('menu_notice_enabled', 'true', 'boolean', 'Enable notice banner on menu page', NOW()),
('menu_notice_text', 'New seasonal menu items available! Try our special Jollof Rice with grilled fish.', 'text', 'Notice message displayed on menu page', NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE updated_at = NOW();
